hero.title: Flexible access for better buying decisions

details.request: Tell us how you receive offers today and what you want to improve.
details.qualification: We talk through your current offer flow, goals and where AutoMargin can help first.

engagement.title: How to use the platform
engagement.description: Choose the operating model that matches how you receive offers, review stock and want to work.

automatic.title: Automatic access
automatic.description: Forward offers to AutoMargin and we process the intake for you. You receive clear output without changing how suppliers send deals.
automatic.fit: Best when you want fast value with minimal internal workflow change.

managed.title: Managed access
managed.description: Upload offers, manage supplier lists and work directly inside AutoMargin. This gives you more control over daily intake.
managed.fit: Best when you want to review, compare and act inside the platform.

api.title: Enterprise API access
api.description: Connect AutoMargin to your own tools with API access, keys and documentation. Build your intake workflow on top of our analysis layer.
api.fit: Best when you already have internal systems or marketplace workflows.

cta.title: Want the right setup?

FAQ.title: Direct answers.
FAQ.homeDescription:
If you can't find what you need, write us.
We answer within one business day.
FAQ.contactPrefix: If you can't find what you're looking for,

what.a: AutoMargin helps dealers review incoming offers faster and focus on better deals. You upload the offers you already receive and AutoMargin shows which cars create margin, which ones will sit and which ones are already placed.

identify.q: How does it identify the best deals?
identify.a: It checks each offer against current market context and turns it into a clear next step. You see which cars are worth acting on and which partners consistently bring the right stock.

files.a: PDF, Excel, Word, Google Sheets and emails - including mixed formats in one batch. Our auto-forwarding handles the rest. Just send it and we parse it.

audience.a: Independent dealers, trading companies and B2B marketplaces who handle high volumes of offers and want tighter control over intake, supplier quality and margin.

trial.q: Can I try AutoMargin before choosing a plan?
trial.a: You can use the public demo with text input to see how AutoMargin works. Account access or a trial period is planned directly with our team after we understand your intake workflow, volume and supplier setup.

security.a: Absolutely. Your files are encrypted, processed in secure environments and never shared with third parties.

prices.q: Can I trust the market prices?
prices.a: Yes. We cross-check against live marketplace listings across Europe and refresh the data regularly, so your team works from current market movement instead of static guesses.

start.a: Submit your request through our contact form or by email and our team will walk you through the setup. Most users get started the same day.

Contact.title: We're here to help.
Contact.description: Tell us what you need and we'll route your request to the right person. We typically respond within 1 business day.

nextSteps.title: Guides to get started

hero.title: Built for the work behind every deal
hero.subtitle: Buying cars is only one part of the job. Execution starts after the yes.
hero.body1: AutoMargin was built from the reality that buyers do not just evaluate cars. They chase offers, compare markets, coordinate paperwork, manage transport and still need to know which partner deserves the next call.
hero.body2: We help dealers prepare the buying work before the day starts, so teams can spend more time closing, handing over and executing with confidence.

story.title: Dealers were losing time before the real work began.
story.p1: The slow part was not ambition. It was the amount of manual judgement required before a buyer could move: open files, compare listings, check context and decide which offers were worth attention.
story.p2: After a deal is closed, the work does not stop. Paperwork, logistics, supplier follow-up and internal handover all compete for the same buyer's time.
story.p3: AutoMargin exists to clear the review work earlier, so buyers can focus on decisions, execution and the partner relationships that move the business forward.

review.label: Use case 01
review.title: Offers arrive faster than teams can qualify them.
review.description: Incoming files and messages create a review queue before anyone knows what is worth acting on.

handover.label: Use case 02
handover.title: Closing creates operational work immediately.
handover.description: The buyer still has documents, transport, internal notes and supplier coordination to handle after the deal is agreed.

supplierNoise.label: Use case 03
supplierNoise.title: Supplier volume can hide supplier quality.
supplierNoise.description: A busy supplier is not always a profitable supplier. Teams need to know who repeatedly sends the right opportunities.

product.title: Imagine every offer already analysed before your team starts working.
product.p1: AutoMargin turns incoming offers into a clearer working list: what deserves action, what should wait and which partner pattern sits behind the opportunity.
product.p2: The goal is not to add another dashboard to check. It is to remove low-value reviewing from the buyer's day and give management a cleaner view of where intake is improving.

principles.title: We build for buying teams that need speed without losing control.

preAnalysed.title: Prepared before action
preAnalysed.description: Offers should be structured and scored before the buyer spends time on them.

execution.title: Built for execution
execution.description: The platform supports the work after the decision: follow-up, handover and repeated supplier action.

network.title: Partner memory
network.description: Every offer should improve the understanding of which relationships create value over time.
